title: The Gamer's Command Block
description: The next generation of command blocks. Full RGB.
body:
***The next generation of command blocks. Full RGB.***

![The Gamer's Command Block logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af64b1c3eed894a823ac005b2a139e34f3390251.png)
The Gamers Command Block texture pack makes the minecraft command block into an RGB command block! Supports all three types of command blocks and is symmetrical!
Watch the video [here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kkFf_BGWc74)!
![A picture of all the command block types.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44eaa10088fd3f024ce82c88bd6762383d0d6c2f_0.webp)
